externalvideo-desc: Embed videos from external providers natively into MediaWiki
externalvideo-upload-permissions: You do not have the necessary permissions to add videos.
externalvideo-error: An error occurred when trying to add the video
externalvideo-invalid-url: The URL provided is not valid. Please provide a valid http or https URL.
externalvideo-provider-not-supported: The URL provided does not match any supported video provider.
externalvideo-thumbnail-download-failed: Failed to download the video thumbnail.
externalvideo-invalid-title: The video title could not be used as a file name.
externalvideo-tmp-file-error: Failed to create a temporary file for the thumbnail.
externalvideo-noid: This file is missing its video ID metadata.
externalvideo-nosrc: The source file for this video could not be found.
externalvideo-imagick-error: An error occurred while processing the video thumbnail image.
